analytics.title: Reports & Analytics

descriptions.attribution: Track lead origins and measure ROI across acquisition channels (Google Ads, Meta, SEO, etc.)
descriptions.satisfaction: Monitor patient satisfaction and identify areas for improvement
descriptions.forecast: Projections based on pipeline and historical trends
descriptions.churn: Identify patients at risk of not returning with AI analysis
descriptions.roi: Measure return on investment from your ad campaigns
descriptions.cohort: Track patient retention by acquisition month
descriptions.ltv: Analyze patient lifetime value distribution, trends, and breakdown by acquisition source
descriptions.cac: Track customer acquisition costs by channel and compare with lifetime value for optimal ROI

customReports.title: My Custom Reports
customReports.description: Create and manage your own analyses

analytics.noChurnDataDescription: Churn risk scores will appear here once calculated.
analytics.attributionEmptyDescription: Leads captured with UTM parameters will appear here.
analytics.noAdSpendDescription: Connect your ad accounts to see ROI by channel.

ltv.clickToExplore: Click on a chart element to see details
ltv.noDataHint: LTV will appear here once patients have completed bookings.

cac.demoNotice: Showing demo data. Connect your ad accounts to see real acquisition costs.
cac.ratioHealthy: Healthy ratio (>3:1) - Your customer lifetime value significantly exceeds acquisition cost.
cac.ratioWarning: Warning (1-3:1) - Your LTV:CAC ratio could be improved. Consider optimizing ad spend.
cac.ratioCritical: Critical (<1:1) - Acquisition costs exceed customer lifetime value. Review your channels.
cac.ratioExplanation: A healthy LTV:CAC ratio is 3:1 or higher, meaning each customer generates 3x their acquisition cost.

exec.roiSubtitle: Is the app paying for itself?
exec.viralGood: Network is self-sustaining — each referrer generates 1+ new patients who become referrers.
exec.viralGrowing: Network is growing but not yet self-sustaining. Focus on increasing referrals per referrer or conversion rate.
exec.commissionInsight: Every CHF 1 in commission generates CHF {{multiplier}} in revenue.
exec.crmSubtitle: Beyond referrals — what the CRM delivers
exec.crmInsight: The CRM consolidates patient management, communications, and analytics into a single platform — reducing operational overhead and enabling data-driven decisions.
